composer: Saki Kaskas, Jeff van Dyck, Alistair Hirst

engine.notes: created by installing microphones in various positions on each car and recording onto eight track digital tape while the car was driven

distinctive_elements: authentic engine sound effects recorded from real sports cars
eight-track digital recordings of vehicle audio

notes.data_limitation: Wikipedia source contains composer credits and SFX creation methodology but lacks track-specific tempo, key, chord progression, or area-specific audio data
notes.tier: T2 - empirical/qualitative data available only for production credits and general SFX approach
